rationale: r1_final_verdict_device_removal: patch 0046 R1 (Rurix-owned scratch indirect buffer, buffer_copy live->scratch, clear/dispatch confined to scratch, draw_list_draw_indirect retargeted to scratch) still device-removes (0x887A0005) on the rb4 exe; the pre-registered arbiter convicts the GENERAL hypothesis that a compute-written DISPATCH_INDIRECT buffer consumed by a same-frame indirect draw removes the device irrespective of buffer/kernel/instance-count
debug_layer_and_gbv_silent: the CPU-visible barrier/state chain validates clean; the fault is on the GPU timeline (RDG missing UAV->INDIRECT_ARGUMENT sync within one frame-graph submission)
r2_rejected: applying last frame's cull results violates the pass's conservative picture-preservation invariant under camera motion (visual gate would only pass on static scenes = dishonest coverage)
upstream_bug_report_candidate: Godot 4.7 D3D12 RDG missing GPU-timeline sync for UAV->INDIRECT_ARGUMENT within one frame-graph submission
